creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: az
Date: Mon Jun 17 03:08:41 2013
New Revision: 321083
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/321083

Log:
  new port wwww/p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool
  
  Tarantool interface for Catalyst based application.
  
  PR:		ports/178620
  Submitted by:	Veniamin Gvozdikov <g.veniamin@googlemail.com>

Added:
  head/www/p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool/
  head/www/p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/www/Makefile

Modified: head/www/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/Makefile	Mon Jun 17 01:50:01 2013	(r321082)
+++ head/www/Makefile	Mon Jun 17 03:08:41 2013	(r321083)
@@ -754,6 +754,7 @@
     SUBDIR += p5-Catalyst-Model-LDAP
     SUBDIR += p5-Catalyst-Model-Memcached
     SUBDIR += p5-Catalyst-Model-Oryx
+    SUBDIR += p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool
     SUBDIR += p5-Catalyst-Model-XML-Feed
     SUBDIR += p5-Catalyst-Model-Xapian
     SUBDIR += p5-Catalyst-Model-Xapian10

Added: head/www/p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool/Makefile	Mon Jun 17 03:08:41 2013	(r321083)
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+# Created by: Gvozdikov Veniamin <g.veniamin@googlemail.com>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	Catalyst-Model-Tarantool
+PORTVERSION=	0.0.1
+CATEGORIES=	www perl5
+MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
+DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-1
+
+MAINTAINER=	g.veniamin@googlemail.com
+COMMENT=	Tarantool interface for Catalyst based application
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Catalyst-Runtime>=5.90001:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Catalyst-Runtime \
+		p5-MR-Tarantool>=0.0.24:${PORTSDIR}/databases/p5-MR-Tarantool
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
+
+PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
+
+MAN3=		Catalyst::Model::Tarantool.3
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/www/p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool/distinfo	Mon Jun 17 03:08:41 2013	(r321083)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (Catalyst-Model-Tarantool-0.0.1-1.tar.gz) = 221b6ee6ab1c7dd0848163d830812aa4525051c08c867b4267e1754a6269c9bc
+SIZE (Catalyst-Model-Tarantool-0.0.1-1.tar.gz) = 2693

Added: head/www/p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool/pkg-descr	Mon Jun 17 03:08:41 2013	(r321083)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+Tarantool interface for Catalyst based application
+
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Catalyst-Model-Tarantool/

Added: head/www/p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool/pkg-plist	Mon Jun 17 03:08:41 2013	(r321083)
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+%%SITE_PERL%%/Catalyst/Model/pod2htmd.tmp
+%%SITE_PERL%%/Catalyst/Model/pod2htmi.tmp
+%%SITE_PERL%%/Catalyst/Model/Tarantool.pm
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Catalyst/Model/Tarantool/.packlist
+@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Catalyst/Model/Tarantool
+@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Catalyst/Model
+@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/Catalyst/Model
